title: The Indian Institutes of Information Technology (Public-private Partnership) Act, 2017
full_text: The Indian Institutes of Information Technology (Public-private Partnership) Act, 2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201723 Act Number: 23 Enactment Date: 2017-08-09 Act Year: 2017 Short Title: The Indian Institutes of Information Technology (Public-private Partnership) Act, 2017 Long Title: An Act to declare certain Indian Institutes of Information Technology established under public-private partnership as institutions of national importance, with a view to develop new knowledge in information technology and to provide manpower of global standards for the information technology industry and to provide for certain other matters connected with such institutions or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 06-09-2017 Notification: S.O. 2928(E) Part-II s. 3(ii) 6-9-2017 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Indian Institutes of Information Technology (Public-private Partnership) Act, 2017 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE INSTITUTES CHAPTER III AUTHORITIES OF INDIAN INSTITUTES OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY ESTABLISHED IN PUBLIC-PRIVATE PARTNERSHIP CHAPTER IV ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER V CO-ORDINATION FORUM CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of certain institutions as institutions of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of Institutes. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of Institutes. Section 6. Objects of Institute. Section 7. Powers and functions of Institute. Section 8. Institutes to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 9. Teaching at Institute. Section 10. Institute to be a distinct legal entity not-for-profit. Section 11. Establishment of Institute by Central Government, State Government and industry partners. Section 12. Visitor. Section 13. Authorities of Institute. Section 14. Board of Governors. Section 15. Term of office of, vacancies among and allowances payable to, members of Board. Section 16. Resignation of Chairperson. Section 17. Powers and functions of Board. Section 18. Senate. Section 19. Powers and functions of Senate. Section 20. Finance Committee. Section 21. Powers and functions of Finance Committee. Section 22. Meetings. Section 23. Director. Section 24. Registrar. Section 25. Review of Performance of Institute. Section 26. Grants by Central Government and State Governments. Section 27. Fund of Institute. Section 28. Accounts and audit. Section 29. Pension and provident fund. Section 30. Appointments. Section 31. Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Statutes how to be made. Section 33. Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 34. Ordinances how to be made. Section 35. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 36. Annual report of Director. Section 37. Annual report of each Institute. Section 38. Co-ordination Forum. Section 39. Term of office and allowances payable to members of Co-ordination Forum. Section 40. Functions and duties of Co-ordination Forum. Section 41. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 42. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 43. Returns and information to be provided to Central Government or State Government. Section 44. Power of Central Government to issue directions. Section 45. Institute to be public authority under Right to Information Act. Section 46. Transitional provisions. Section 47. Power to remove difficulties. Section 48. Laying of rules, Statutes, Ordinances and notification. Schedule 1.
